entity.description: The father of Hoshea, who was made ruler over the Ephraimites (1 Chr. 27:20).

nodes.label: Hoshea
nodes.description: 1 Chr. 27:20. The ruler of Ephraim in David’s time.

verses.text: Of the children of Ephraim, Hoshea the son of Azaziah: of the half tribe of Manasseh, Joel the son of Pedaiah:
